evidence_from_audit: Weak-fold market feature frequencies differ from non-weak days.
overfit_risk: high; regime filters can overfit small fold samples
why_it_might_help: Could avoid conditions where current playbook repeatedly loses.

evidence_from_audit: Weak days show identifiable trend/range/volatility traits.
overfit_risk: medium-high; future scout must be bounded and chronological
why_it_might_help: A module designed for the opposite payoff shape may reduce fold drawdowns.

evidence_from_audit: Weak folds include overlapping module fire-days and/or scheduler skipped overlaps.
overfit_risk: medium; must not be tuned to individual dates
why_it_might_help: Changing priority could let later helpful modules replace early losers.
